title: Day of the Tentacle Gameplay Map

narrative.description: Day of the Tentacle (1993) is a acclaimed adventure title recognized in retro gaming lists for its distinctive mechanics, pacing, and lasting influence on the genre.
narrative.core_loop: Click through scenes, combine inventory items, and solve story-driven puzzles.
